tone: Professional teaching deck — clear hierarchy, confident spacing
design_principles: Fill the entire 1280×720 canvas; never leave an empty lower third
Consistent accent top bar on all non-hero slides
Generous padding but content anchored in a full-height grid
One palette for the whole deck — no per-slide theme switches
Vary layout composition per slide; never repeat the same layout twice in a row
slide_prompt: Use the locked deck palette but VARY composition per slide (FAQ split, metrics, quote, cards, two-column — never repeat the same layout on consecutive slides). Fill 1280×720; teaching tone, zh-Hant when user writes Chinese. No placeholder lines like 'Key point for slide'.
